description_long: This is a medium-sized dog with a robust, athletic build and a thick, double-layered coat. Its fur is predominantly gray with white markings on the face, chest, legs, and underbelly, and it has striking blue eyes that give it a piercing gaze. The ears are pricked and triangular, standing upright on the head, while the bushy tail is carried high and curves slightly upwards. The muzzle is well-defined and tapers to a black nose, and the legs are straight and sturdy, suited for active movement. The overall appearance is reminiscent of northern working breeds, with a wolf-like facial mask and a dense, plush coat. No collar or leash is visible, and the dog stands alert, exuding energy and attentiveness.
description: A medium-sized, gray and white dog with pricked ears, blue eyes, and a bushy tail held high, resembling a Siberian Husky. Its thick coat and athletic build suggest a northern working breed.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dog's symmetrical face, pricked ears, blue eyes, and white markings on the muzzle and chest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the dog's athletic build, bushy tail raised high, and the gray and white fur pattern along the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, upright tail, and the even distribution of gray fur with white legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same fur pattern, pricked ears, and the dog's attentive stance.
